mapper.sql: id, user_id, workspace_id, name, description, token_prefix, token_hash, status, expires_at, last_used_at, last_used_ip, revoked_at, revoked_reason, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_mcp_token where token_prefix = #{tokenPrefix} limit 1
select t.*, w.name as workspace_name from t_r_mcp_token t left join t_r_workspace w on w.id = t.workspace_id where t.id = #{id}
select t.*, w.name as workspace_name from t_r_mcp_token t left join t_r_workspace w on w.id = t.workspace_id where t.user_id = #{userId} order by t.created_at desc
select t.*, w.name as workspace_name from t_r_mcp_token t left join t_r_workspace w on w.id = t.workspace_id where t.workspace_id = #{workspaceId} order by t.created_at desc
mapper.update: update t_r_mcp_token set status = 'EXPIRED' where id = #{id} and status = 'ACTIVE'
